name: @mattheworiordan/remi
description: Fast, reliable CLI for Apple Reminders with section support and iCloud sync

scripts.test:soak:
echo '
Soak Test: Cross-device sync verification
=========================================
Copy the prompt from tests/soak/SOAK_TEST.md and paste it into
a Claude Code session with computer-use MCP connected.

Or run: cat tests/soak/SOAK_TEST.md
'
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run build:swift
scripts.postinstall: npm run build:swift || echo 'Swift build skipped (non-macOS or missing Xcode tools)'

author: Matthew O'Riordan
